prompt: Complete the three independent input utility modules. `src/is-hex-color.mjs` must export `isHexColor(value)`, accepting only strings in `#RGB` or `#RRGGBB` form, case-insensitively. `src/is-safe-username.mjs` must export `isSafeUsername(value)`, accepting only 3–16 ASCII letters, digits, or underscores, beginning with a letter. `src/parse-port.mjs` must export `parsePort(value)`, returning an integer for canonical decimal input from 1 through 65535 and returning `null` otherwise. Keep each function in its named module; none requires another utility module.
